summary: Follow-up System Testing - Iteration 96. All features verified: 13 sales stages including Follow-up at order 2, auto-move logic working, date filter UI present, follow-up badges on cards, calendar icon buttons for scheduling, Schedule Follow-up dialog functional.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

seed_data_creation: Created test follow-up with note 'TEST_followup_iteration96' for tomorrow's date
context_for_next_testing_agent: Follow-up system fully functional. 13 sales stages with Follow-up at order 2. Auto-move logic moves leads with due follow-ups to stg_sales_followup. Date filter filters leads by follow-up date. Currently 3 leads in Follow-up stage: Vinoth Kumar (follow-up 2026-03-22), Harini (follow-up 2026-03-21), TEST_RoughReq (follow-up 2026-03-21). The date filter correctly shows only 2 leads when set to today (2026-03-21).

feature_1_sales_login.description: Login as Sales user via POST /api/auth/demo-login

feature_2_13_stages_with_followup.description: Verify 13 stages returned including Follow-up (stg_sales_followup) at order 2
feature_2_13_stages_with_followup.evidence: 13 stages found: New Appointment(1), Follow-up(2), Discussion(3), Site Visit(4), RE Requested(5), RE-From Planning(6), RE-To Client(7), Negotiation(8), Deal Closed(9), Payment Collect(10), Accountant Approval(11), Project Onboarded(12), Lost(13)

feature_3_auto_move_logic.description: Verify leads with due follow-ups auto-move to stg_sales_followup
feature_3_auto_move_logic.evidence: 3 leads in Follow-up stage: Vinoth Kumar, Harini, TEST_RoughReq_ef8f94

feature_5_next_followup_date_field.description: Verify leads in Follow-up stage have next_followup_date field
feature_5_next_followup_date_field.evidence: Backend adds next_followup_date for sorting Follow-up stage leads

feature_6_frontend_followup_column.description: Kanban shows Follow-up column with leads
feature_6_frontend_followup_column.evidence: Follow-up column visible with 2 leads (filtered by today's date)

feature_7_date_filter_ui.description: Date filter UI with Follow-up label, date input, and Today button
feature_7_date_filter_ui.evidence: All UI elements present: Follow-up: label, date input (03/21/2026), Today button

feature_8_followup_date_badges.description: Lead cards show follow-up date badges with date and note
feature_8_followup_date_badges.evidence: Badges visible: '21 Mar - Call about site visit', '21 Mar - Discuss pricing'

feature_9_calendar_icon_buttons.description: Calendar icon button on lead cards for scheduling follow-ups
feature_9_calendar_icon_buttons.evidence: 5 calendar icon buttons found with data-testid='schedule-followup-{lead_id}'

feature_10_schedule_followup_dialog.description: Click calendar icon opens Schedule Follow-up dialog with date and note inputs
feature_10_schedule_followup_dialog.evidence: Dialog opens with title 'Schedule Follow-up', date input, note input, Cancel and Schedule buttons
